name: Celestial Aether-Seraphim Wings
description: A majestic hyper-dimensional array of fractal wings enriched with aerodynamic lift physics. Angle of attack α from mouse Y drives C_L=2πα (thin airfoil). Stall at ~15° creates turbulent breakdown. Bass drives flapping frequency via damped oscillation. Temporal feedback, chromatic aberration, and ACES tone mapping.

params.name: Fractal Spread
params.description: Adjusts the spread of the fractal wings

params.name: Feather Thickness
params.description: Adjusts the thickness of the geometric feathers
